subcodes.first_line: O my God, Thou knowest full well that my heart hath melted, my liver hath seethed, my soul hath cried out, and my inmost being hath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت تعلم یا الهی بان قلبی قد ذابت و کبدی قد فارت و روحی قد صاحت و سری قد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
